microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable proof-of-value execution across distributed enterprise workloads.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model for observability and storage infrastructure.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating technical stakeholders across IT, Security, and Engineering.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring telemetry-heavy planning workflows to reduce cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, directly improving field team throughput for enterprise customer engagements.

Developed and socialized technical collateral — including use-case documentation and internal runbooks — to enable field teams to conduct more effective customer-facing demos and accelerate proof-of-concept outcomes across the Storage and Analysis portfolio.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting customer-style demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly on log and data pipeline tasks.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ structured discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical observability and telemetry workflow gaps that directly influenced the feature backlog.

Improved data retrieval and **telemetry search performance** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% across distributed engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, consolidating inputs from 140+ teams into a single executable roadmap.

Drove a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate high-frequency, high-impact critical paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and pipeline health across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility to target automation gaps and prioritize high-value infrastructure investments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping software and hardware dependencies across 1,200+ stations in a distributed robotics environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain continuous delivery velocity across cross-functional engineering teams.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs across distributed infrastructure teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process, enabling faster customer engagement and improving pipeline conversion across new and existing accounts.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to improve inbound lead quality and consultative selling outcomes.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that directly informed data-driven decisions on customer segmentation and deal structure.

tailoring_notes: 'proof-of-value' (JD term) woven into microsoft_ft bullet#2 to mirror Cribl's PoV sales motion language
'observability and storage infrastructure' (JD domain: Storage & Analysis) placed in microsoft_ft bullet#3 to anchor Cyrus directly in Cribl's product area
'telemetry' (Cribl's core platform vocabulary) appears in microsoft_2023 bullet#3 and microsoft_ft bullet#5 to signal domain fluency with Cribl's AI Platform for Telemetry positioning
'consultative selling' (JD requirement) woven into pro_painters bullet#2 to surface the land-and-expand and pipeline-growth behaviors Cribl explicitly calls out
